code: import{useEffect,useState}from"react";import api from"../api/axios";import"./styles/AdminStudents.css";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function AdminStudents(){const[students,setStudents]=useState([]);useEffect(()=>{fetchStudents();},[]);const fetchStudents=async()=>{try{const res=await api.get("/admin/students");console.log("STUDENTS FROM BACKEND:",res.data);setStudents(res.data);}catch(err){console.log(err);}};const handleDelete=async id=>{try{await api.delete("/admin/students/".concat(id));setStudents(prev=>prev.filter(student=>student._id!==id));}catch(err){console.log("Delete failed");}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"admin-page",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{className:"admin-title",children:"Manage Students"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"admin-card",children:students.length===0?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"No students found."}):students.map(student=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"student-row",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("strong",{children:student.name||"No Name"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:student.email})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"delete-btn",onClick:()=>handleDelete(student._id),children:"\uD83D\uDDD1 Delete"})]},student._id))})]});}export default AdminStudents;
